title: Catalog remaining authenticated/variant Ewing lines
context: Beyond the core roster, additional authenticated/variant Ewing lines can be catalogued as throughput from MODEL-ROSTER.md via the gate. The concrete set is gate-determined from the roster, so this is a representative throughput task, not a fan-out across pre-named lines. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Catalogue remaining gate-passed authenticated/variant Ewing lines as throughput from MODEL-ROSTER.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Additional models are catalogued only after passing gate-002 (committed artifact) from MODEL-ROSTER.md candidates; the set is gate-determined, not fabricated.
Each new entry is fully field-level provenanced at >= 90/100 with authentication status and resolved identity across all three ID systems.
Known-misidentified/variant lines are catalogued with their prominent warning, not dropped.
No NC/controlled data redistributed; deliverable dataset licensed CC-BY-4.0; domain + license reviewers signed off.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: catalog/ additional gate-passed authenticated/variant Ewing-line entries (dataset).
